---
title: "TWEEDIE"
generated: true
description: "The Tweedie family at power ``1.5`` (log link) -- compound Poisson-gamma responses; build others with ``tweedie(p)``."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:TWEEDIE -->
```python
TWEEDIE = tweedie(1.5)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:TWEEDIE -->
The Tweedie family at power `1.5` (log link) -- compound Poisson-gamma responses; build others with `tweedie(p)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
